title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 140.580 - Action for the recovery of possession
text:
140.580.  Action for the recovery of possession. — Any person hereafter putting a tax deed on record in the proper county shall be deemed to have set up such a title to the land described therein as shall enable the party claiming to own the same land to maintain an action for the recovery of the possession thereof against the grantee in deed, or any person claiming under him, whether such grantee or person is in actual possession of the land or not.
(RSMo 1939 § 11178) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9965; 1919 § 12955; 1909 § 11507
